idea-plugin.name: MockClean AEM
idea-plugin.description:
MockClean AEM is an IntelliJ IDEA plugin for cleaning AEM mock JSON files.

Keep your AEM JSON mocks focused on what your tests actually need.

It removes configured metadata properties such as:

  • jcr:created
  • jcr:createdBy
  • cq:lastModified

Features

  • Recursively cleans nested JSON objects and arrays
  • Preserves the rest of the document structure
  • Supports custom cleanup rules from plugin settings
  • Works directly on the current editor file

Usage

  1. Open a JSON file in the editor.
  2. Run Tools | Clean MockClean AEM JSON.
  3. Review the cleaned file and save if needed.
idea-plugin.change-notes: Initial release: added recursive cleanup for AEM unit-test JSON mocks, configurable metadata keys through IntelliJ Settings, default AEM system-property presets, and Keymap support for assigning the cleanup action to a custom shortcut.

action.description: Remove configured AEM metadata properties from the current JSON file
